title: Two tourists rescued after rental car swept away in floodwaters near Lonavala - Mid-day
article_text: Abhinandan Lodha has revealed how Amitabh Bachchan reached out to him at 3 am in 2023 while he was in Australia to purchase land in Ayodhya. After learning the 15,000 sq ft plot would cost around Rs 15 crore, the actor transferred the amount the very next day. Bachchan has since expanded his real estate portfolio in the holy city with multiple investments
